---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior (full checklist in ISSUE.md at repo root)
title: "[bug] "
labels: []
---

Thanks for taking the time to report a problem.

**Please use the checklist in [`ISSUE.md`](https://github.com/sempervent/postgres-query-autopsy-tool/blob/main/ISSUE.md)** (also in the repository root — copy the sections into this issue). That template matches how this repo triages **Analyze / Compare / clipboard / CI / docs** issues.

Minimum to include:

1. **Summary** — one line  
2. **Expected vs actual**  
3. **Reproduction steps** — or a reference to a fixture under `tests/backend.unit/.../fixtures/postgres-json/`  
4. **Environment** — OS, browser, how you run the app (Docker vs Vite), Node/.NET versions if relevant  

For **copy/clipboard** bugs, note whether the site is **HTTPS** or **localhost** and any **browser permissions** messages.
